div.h1: Execution Ports: Compiler-Generated hadd vs Shuffle+Add

div.p: hadd_ps is a horizontal operation that only executes on Port 5 (shuffle unit). Multiple hadd instructions must serialize, creating a dependency chain.

ul.li: Add operates on Ports 0/1 (4 cycles, parallel with next shuffle)

div.p: The compiler's default hadd chain is 2-3× slower than hand-written shuffle+add.
